array.name: helper_content_desc_hdmi
array.item: Ready For lets you connect to a TV, monitor or PC for gaming, entertainment, remote phone control and more.
You can switch to a different experience by tapping on the floating bubble on your phone.
Connect a keyboard and mouse for the best experience. If you don\'t have a mouse, your phone screen will turn into a trackpad.
Some apps may not work well in desktop mode and some may not let you play content on a second display. You may also need to adjust your monitor or TV for the best viewing experience.
